codeReview.summary: The TabNavigation component is well-implemented with excellent test coverage, proper accessibility, and responsive design. The worker fixed a truncated integration test file (App.tab-navigation.test.jsx) that was missing closing braces. The component follows all established conventions, integrates properly with AppContext, and has 27 unit tests + 20 integration tests all passing.

summary: TabNavigation feature passes review. The component is fully implemented with responsive mobile/desktop layouts, keyboard accessibility, proper ARIA attributes, and comprehensive test coverage (47 tests total). The worker's fix for the truncated test file was successful, and all tests pass. No issues or shared state gaps identified.
